description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 1 / section 6. Stable, cache-friendly observation block layout**.

Goal: redesign the injected OM region into deterministic durable / active / guidance segments that map cleanly to possible future multi-message injection.

Relevant code paths:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/engine.ts` (`buildObservationContext`)
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/index.ts` (`before_agent_start`)
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/prompts.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/format.ts`

Worker notes:
- keep the current single-string injection path working if pi still only exposes that hook
- segment logically even if physically still one string
- prioritize stable ordering and clear separation of durable vs volatile content
title: Redesign OM injection into deterministic durable, active, and guidance segments
